entity.label: Shemaiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Levite in the time of David, who with 200 of his brethren took part in the bringing up of the ark from Obed-edom to Hebron (1 Chr. 15:8).

nodes.label: Shemaiah
nodes.description: A Levite in the time of David, who with 200 of his brethren took part in the bringing up of the ark from Obed-edom to Hebron (1 Chr. 15:8).

verses.text: Of the sons of Elizaphan; Shemaiah the chief, and his brethren two hundred:
And David called for Zadok and Abiathar the priests, and for the Levites, for Uriel, Asaiah, and Joel, Shemaiah, and Eliel, and Amminadab,
